user.title: DOOM
user.description: Hell's forces have breached your smart home. Set up DOOM to fight back with a playable card right on your dashboard. Rip and tear, until it is done.

abort.already_configured: DOOM is already ripping and tearing on your system. There can only be one Doom Slayer.
